text:
Created attachment 248950
bmd-2.3.patch

I updated and released the new bmd version 2.3.
Please take a look at the release note in the following URL.

https://github.com/yuichiro-naito/bmd/releases/tag/2.3

The attached patch updates sysutils/bmd port.
Please apply to the Ports tree.
